name: openoutreach
description: An automation tool leveraging AI to identify and generate leads on LinkedIn by describing your product and defining your target market to find the most relevant contacts.

inputs.name: product_description
inputs.description: A detailed description of the user's product or service to tailor lead searching.

inputs.name: target_market
inputs.description: Definition or characteristics of the intended customer segment or market.

outputs.name: lead_list
outputs.description: An AI-generated list of potential LinkedIn leads matching the product and target market criteria.

steps: User inputs product description and target market details.
AI processes inputs to generate criteria for LinkedIn lead search.
System searches LinkedIn profiles to find matching leads.
Filtered leads are compiled into a structured list.
User can use the lead list for outreach or further engagement.
use_cases: Sales teams seeking qualified LinkedIn leads automatically.
Marketers aiming to identify potential customers based on product niche.
Businesses automating their LinkedIn prospecting efforts.
patterns: AI-driven lead discovery based on product and market description
Automated outreach and lead generation workflows
Data extraction and filtering from LinkedIn profiles

prompt_templates.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Find LinkedIn leads for a product described as: "{product_description}" targeting: "{target_market}".
